title: Vicloon Wine Cooler, Portable Wine Bottle Chiller with Aerator Pourer, Stainless Steel, Wines Bottle Cooler Stick with Aerator Pourer, Wines Chiller Stick for White & Red
features: 【Premium Quality】 FDA certified food grade materials ensures pure aroma of your wine. Sleek design. Easy to clean, just rinse chill rod and pourer with warm water after each use.
【Ergonomical Design】Acrylic wine pourer is designed for consistent and predictable flow-control every time 100% drip free to avoid mess and wastage.

【Wine Chiller】 Small and easy to store in the freezer for when needed, keeps the liquid nice and chilled without the need to keep putting back in the fridge or keeping in an ice bucket. Keeps wine cool for up to one hour.
【Built-in Aerator】 The built-in aerator in the liquor pourer allows your wine breathe to perfection for maximum flavour, enhance the wine taste and smell. Makes every glass of wine taste better.
【Great for All Occasions】 Perfect gift for wine enthusiasts collectors, wine lovers. A must have wine accessory for day to day use, parties, birthdays, celebrations and festivals.
description: Product Description Vicloon Wine Cooler,Wine Chiller with Stainless Steel Wine Pouer and Chill Rod,Wine Bottle Cooler Stick with Aerator Pourer This wine cooler which keeps wine cool for up to one hour, is not only makes the taste of your wine or drink won't be diluted by melting, but also built-in dual intake aerator mixes extra oxygen to maximally enhance wine flavor. It comes with exquisite box to be a great gift for your friends, families and loved ones. Dimensions: Wine Chiller Stick: 19.3cm x 1.6cm Wine Pourer: 13.3cm x 2.5cm Pouring & Rubber Seal Pouring - Made of food-grade acrylic, unique spout design to prevent spills. Rubber Seal - Sillicone gsket forms leak proof seal with wine bottle; taperd design for a snug fit on diffrent size bottles. Aerator Mixes extra oxygen, allow your wine to breathe maximally anhance the flavor. Stainless Steel Cooling Rod Made of high quality 304 stainless steel, this cooling rod is safety, durable and easy to clean. Non-toxic Ice Gel The stainless steel Cooling Rod is filled with non-toxic ice gel, keeps wine chilled at the optimal temperature. Not Just Cooling keeps wine cool for up to one hour. built-in dual intake aerator mixes extra oxygen to maximally enhance wine flavor Ideal gift It comes with exquisite box to be a great gift for wine enthusiasts collectors, wine lovers, friends, families and so on.
